name: gitmatter
description: Audited legal AI over MCP — contract review, redline, tabular extraction, document generation, and a git-style audit history.

interface.shortDescription: Audited legal AI: review, redline, extract, generate.
interface.longDescription: Connect your AI agent to gitmatter — an audited legal backend. Contract review, tabular extraction, document generation, and reusable workflows on a git-style audit spine. Every action is recorded under your account with author, message, and field-level diff.
